lines.heading: Welcome
lines.text: Welcome to the Yamacraw Business Portal — a civic directory built for the Yamacraw community in The Bahamas. We connect residents with the local businesses, contractors, and service providers that make their neighbourhood thrive.

lines.heading: Featured Listings
lines.text: Right from the homepage, you can see featured listings — from family-run restaurants to government-contracted tradesmen. Each listing is reviewed and approved before it goes live, so residents know what they're looking at is trusted.

lines.heading: Browse by Category
lines.text: Browsing by category is the fastest way to find what you need. Restaurants, beauty and wellness, auto services, construction trades — every type of business that serves the Yamacraw area, one click away.

lines.heading: The Full Directory
lines.text: The full directory lets you filter by category, or jump to contractors specifically — handy for government tenders or major home projects. Every card shows a logo, a rating, and a quick summary, so you can scan fast.

lines.heading: Business Profile
lines.text: Opening a listing gives you everything you need in one place: photos, reviews, operating hours, contact details, and a direct inquiry form. Residents don't have to dig through social media — they reach the business straight from the portal.

lines.heading: Owner Dashboard
lines.text: For the business owners and contractors in our community, the portal is just as simple. After signing up, you land on a dashboard that shows all your listings, views, inquiries, and reviews at a glance.

lines.heading: Create a Listing
lines.text: Creating a listing takes a few minutes — name, category, description, hours, photos, and you're submitted for admin review. Once approved, you're discoverable to everyone in Yamacraw and beyond.

lines.heading: Stay Responsive
lines.text: Inquiries from residents come straight into your inbox. You can reply, mark as spam, or close them out — everything the business needs to stay responsive. The Yamacraw Business Portal — built for the community, owned by the community.
